topology: Layered AWS security architecture with the following components and connections: Identity & Access Management Layer contains AWS KMS (handles centralized keys, encryption at rest, key rotation) and AWS IAM (MFA enabled, least privilege, admin monitoring). Web Application Security Layer contains AWS WAF (web exploit protection, rule configuration, traffic filtering). Data Storage Layer contains Amazon S3 (encryption at rest via KMS, access logging, versioning enabled). Monitoring & Detection Layer contains CloudWatch (alarms configured, log aggregation, real-time monitoring) and Inspector (vulnerability scanning, proactive detection, critical findings resolved). Connectivity: AWS KMS encrypts data at rest for Amazon S3. AWS IAM manages policies for AWS WAF and provides access control to Amazon S3. AWS IAM sends security events to CloudWatch. AWS WAF sends filtered traffic to Amazon S3. Amazon Inspector performs vulnerability assessments on Amazon S3. CloudWatch sends scan results to Inspector and security scans to AWS WAF. CloudWatch outputs logs and metrics.
